text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 57 

SEX_CD 

LABEL: Patient Sex 

DESCRIPTION: Sex of the patient as indicated on the event record. 

SHORT NAME: SEX_CD 

LONG NAME: SEX_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Blank = Unknown 
1 = Male 
2 = Female 

COMMENT: In 2025 this field was renamed to SEX_CD to comply with Executive Order 14168. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
